title: Money Heist
overview: To carry out the biggest heist in history, a mysterious man called The Professor recruits a band of eight robbers who have a single characteristic: none of them has anything to lose. Five months of seclusion - memorizing every step, every detail, every probability - culminate in eleven days locked up in the National Coinage and Stamp Factory of Spain, surrounded by police forces and with dozens of hostages in their power, to find out whether their suicide wager will lead to everything or nothing.

episodes.episodeDescription: The Professor recruits a young woman and seven other criminals for a bold heist targeting the Royal Mint of Spain. As the group takes hostages, the police begin negotiations.
Negotiator Raquel establishes contact while the robbers manage growing tension inside. One hostage becomes crucial to the gang’s plan.
Police obtain a key clue about one robber’s identity. Raquel grows suspicious of a man she meets outside the case.
The heist faces complications as pressure builds inside the Mint. The Professor anticipates police strategies and adapts his plan.
A critical error threatens the operation while emotional tensions rise among the robbers and hostages.
The Professor must act quickly to stay hidden as the investigation intensifies. Inside, trust issues begin to fracture the group.
The standoff continues as both sides try to outmaneuver each other. Pressure inside the Mint pushes everyone toward breaking point.
Police attempt new infiltration tactics while the Professor stays one step ahead. Cracks in the plan begin to emerge.
Chaos erupts as hostages take action, forcing the robbers to respond quickly. The situation grows increasingly unstable.
Evidence begins to threaten the Professor’s identity while internal conflicts intensify among the crew.
The robbers struggle to maintain control as the police close in. Emotional and strategic tensions rise sharply.
A high-risk plan is launched to regain advantage. Both sides prepare for a major turning point in the heist.
As the heist nears a crucial stage, the robbers push toward escape. The outcome remains uncertain as tensions peak.
The Professor reunites the team to execute an even bigger heist at the Bank of Spain. As they prepare, old relationships and new tensions begin to surface.
The group puts their new plan into motion, carefully entering the Bank of Spain. Meanwhile, the authorities scramble to understand their strategy.
The heist intensifies as the robbers take control inside the bank. Outside, the police work to counter the Professor’s moves.
A critical explosion shifts the balance of power. The team faces unexpected resistance as emotions begin to run high.
The Professor’s backup plans come into play as the police close in. Inside, trust issues threaten the operation.
The situation escalates when one of the team members is pushed to the limit. Both sides prepare for a major confrontation.
The robbers attempt to regain control while dealing with internal conflict. Outside, the investigation takes a surprising turn.
A bold rescue plan is set into motion as the Professor faces mounting pressure. The stakes grow higher than ever.
The heist reaches a dramatic turning point as both sides push toward victory. The outcome hangs in the balance.
When Rio is captured, a distraught Tokyo turns to the Professor for help. Armed with a bold new plan, they reunite the team in order to rescue him .
The Professor recruits Martín to put his brother's plan into action and target the Bank of Spain. First step? Create total chaos .
Tokyo and Nairobi's efforts go drastically awry. The Professor recalls Berlin detailing how they'd steal the gold from the Bank of Spain .
Tamayo's breaches of protocol surprise the Professor. Bogotá calms Denver's anxieties. With time running out, Palermo initiates the Flipper plan .
The Professor shocks officials with his latest stunt, but in response, a new inspector rattles Raquel. Palermo and Nairobi get into a heated argument .
Just as Inspector Sierra orchestrates a plan to sneak a team into the Bank of Spain, the Professor and Raquel lose communication with Palermo .
Tokyo's happiness turns bittersweet. Ángel closes in on a quarreling Raquel and the Professor. Authorities offer a multimillion-euro reward for information .
Tokyo attempts to drown her sorrows. Sierra uses personal tactics to target a vulnerable Nairobi, while Suárez continues to hunt down Raquel .
Anger and grief heighten tensions between the group. The Professor, while in mourning, attempts to make a daring and dangerous escape .
Palermo shocks the group with his actions. Sierra pressures her subject to take a deal. The Professor remembers his brother's wedding .
The Professor's mole attempts to pass along his message to the person inside the tent. Denver's jealousy toward Mónica and Rio's friendship heightens .
In the past, Berlin predicts that Gandía will cause problems for the operation. Sierra's interrogation of Lisboa leads to a personal revelation .
Denver turns to an undercover source for help. Nairobi attempts to motivate her team as the danger around them intensifies .
With Nairobi held hostage, Gandía negotiates with the crew. The Professor desperately seeks a new plan to save his team .
The group reels following the attack on one of their own. The Professor puts his adjusted plan in motion with the help of new recruits and Palermo .
The Professor, Benjamin and the others attempt to free Lisbon. Tokyo's anger threatens her faith in the plan. Sierra takes matters into her own hands .
The Professor faces off with Sierra as Tamayo raises the stakes of the negotiations by calling the army. In the past, Berlin meets with a young Palermo .
Sierra pressures her subject to take a deal. The Professor remembers his brother's wedding. Denver's jealousy toward Mónica and Rio's friendship heightens .

episodes.episodeTitle: Welcome to the Spectacle of Life
episodes.episodeDescription: A betrayal and an emergency both catch Sierra by surprise. Palermo rallies the troops as the army closes in on the gang .
With Helsinki's life in danger, the thieves mount a covert counter attack. Years earlier, Berlin and his son conduct their first heist together .
While surrounded by gunfire and trapped in the kitchen, Tokyo reminisces about her first love and initial encounter with the Professor .
Tokyo, bleeding out on the ground and about to die, reflects back on the nature of gold. Sierra takes advantage of the chaos to make her move .
Tamayo mounts a manhunt in his neighborhood as his foes hide. In the past, Berlin and Palermo explain their master plan to the team .
The Berlin flashbacks and the Bank of Spain heist finally collide. The team works to finish extracting the gold pellets out of the bank .
The Professor is left reeling after his tactics are used against him. When it seems like all hope is lost, he makes a bold decision .
With multiple lives on the line and Spain's economy at stake, the Professor and Tamayo engage in one final showdown .
